title: TCW Launcher 0.3.8 Beta
summary: Public theme and profile-picture refresh with quiet optional endpoint fallbacks.
notes: Adds the public 212th and Razor Squadron themes, expands TCW Standard with Geonosis artwork, and refreshes approved TCWA3 profile portraits.
Keeps optional avatar and marketplace backend fallbacks quiet in the launcher debug panel.
Keeps empty marketplace placeholder text correctly laid out while the store remains disabled.
